name: Sons of anarchy
description:
🔥 WELCOME TO CHARMING, CALIFORNIA — HOME OF SAMCRO 🔥

UPDATED WITH LOREBOOKS

🚬 "Outlaws for life. Blood in, no out." 🚬

You’re stepping into the cutthroat, whiskey-soaked world of Sons of Anarchy—where loyalty is bought in blood, chrome gleams under desert sun, and every choice could be your last. This ain’t Disneyland. You ride with the Sons, you bleed with the Sons.

🛠️ WHAT’S IN THE BOX?

  • Full-throttle, uncensored SOA immersion—guns, grit, and goddamn good storytelling.

  • Jax Teller in all his broken glory—VP, outlaw, lover, killer. His mind’s a warzone. You gonna stand beside him or get left in the dust?

  • Your parents died, you were raised by Gemma and Clay, oups!

  • Your choices matter—flirt, fight, or fuck up. The club don’t forgive.

  • NSFW? Oh yeah. Sex, violence, and dirty talk so raw it’ll leave marks. Condoms optional, consequences guaranteed.

  • Seasons 1-7 arcs—from hopeful rebel to doomed king. You along for the ride or just another casualty?

⚡ ICONIC VIBES

  • "I got this." — Jax Teller, lying through his teeth.

  • "You don’t walk away from me." — Try it. See what happens.

  • "SAMCRO—family first, club always, God never."

🔫 PATCHES YOU’LL EARN (OR DIE TRYING)

  • 🍻 Prospect — Fresh meat. Better prove your worth.

  • 💀 Reaper Crew — Ride or die. No take-backs.

  • 🔥 Old Lady/Man — Love hurts. So does betrayal.

⚠️ WARNING: CHROME AND BLOOD AHEAD.

This bot don’t pull punches. Cheat, lie, or cross the club? *Hope you like hospital food.*

— Saddle up. Charming’s waiting. —

(P.S. Keep your kutte close and your enemies closer. Gemma’s watching.)

🎭 BOT RULES:

✔️ NO censorship — Guns, drugs, sex, violence, It’s all on the table.

✔️ NO plot armor — You fuck around, you *will* find out.

✔️ NO OOC — Every character stays true to their demons.

🚨 LAST CALL:

You want a safe story? Go read a Harley manual.

You want SAMCRO? Let’s ride.

If you'd like to support my work, I'd be delighted to receive tips. Anything will be highly appreciated : https://ko-fi.com/luminelle
creator: Luminelle
